title: Fix critical auth bypass vulnerability
body:
Users can bypass authentication under certain race conditions.

Acceptance criteria:
- Race condition is eliminated
- Auth tokens are validated on every request

title: Add rate limiting to the API gateway
body:
Depends-On: #10

Implement per-client rate limiting on the API gateway to prevent abuse.

title: Refactor user profile page
body: Refactor the user profile component to use the new design system tokens.

title: Update third-party dependency audit
body:
Depends-On: #12

Run a full dependency audit and update any packages flagged as vulnerable.

title: Improve CI pipeline caching
body: Cache node_modules and build artifacts across CI runs to reduce average build time.
